violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by coffee carafes in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Equipment was removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Knives were observed stored on an unclean surface (in-between prep units) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knives were washed, rinsed, and sanitized and then placed on a dry, clean surface. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The prep unit cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Knives were observed stored on an unclean surface (in-between prep units) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knives were washed, rinsed, and sanitized and then placed on a dry, clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
